form.formComment: Last start ran last of 9 at this track on March 30 over 1800m, 8 len behind Blizzardboy with 60kg at $15. The run before that 2nd of 7 at Durbanville on March 18 over 2000m, neck behind Heavenly Prince with 59.5kg at $5.50. Easily accounted for last time out but this suits.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start second last of 9 at this track on December 17 over 1400m, 5.5 len behind Ocean Sky with 59.5kg at $126. Went for a break before returning ran last in a small field at Durbanville on March 4 over 1600m, 8 len behind Fort Yukon with 60kg at $11. Needs more time.

Went for a break before returning ran last in a small field at Durbanville on March 4 over 1600m, 8 len behind Fort Yukon with 60kg at $11. Needs more time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Jumped slow, losing one length, and thereafter slow into stride.

form.formComment: At the latest run ran last in a small field at Durbanville on March 21 over 1600m, 8 len behind Trip To Camelot with 52.5kg at $67. The start before that ran last of 11 at this track on February 22 over 1400m, 30 len behind Greenchoice with 60kg at $201. Looks tested again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, carried in marginally by Cardinal Point.
Jumped slow, losing two lengths and raced green.

form.formComment: Returns from a 60-day let-up. Last start ran last of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1600m, 12 len behind Bonelli with 52.5kg at $101. The run before that second last of 11 at Durbanville on January 17 over 1400m, 6 len behind Meet The King with 59.5kg at $101. Win doesn't look likely.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, made contact with Prince Of Egypt.

form.formComment: At the latest run 5th of 7 at Durbanville on March 18 over 2000m, 6 len behind Heavenly Prince carrying 55.5kg at $4.80. Before that 3rd of 10 at Durbanville on February 14 over 1600m, 1.75 len behind Bonelli with 51.4kg at $101. Capable of a better run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: had to be checked leaving the 300m.
Proved difficult to settle in the early stages.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last campaign second last of 10 at Durbanville February 11 over 1800m, 8 len behind Double Dash with 50.5kg at $26. First up last campaign eighth of 11 at Durbanville January 17 over 1400m, 3 len behind Meet The King with 50.5kg at $81. Looks tested without a run under the belt.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Returns from a 46-day let-up. Last start second last of 9 at this track on February 28 over 1600m, 13 len behind Money Extractor with 54.5kg at $9. Before that 2nd of 8 at Durbanville on January 21 over 2000m, long-neck behind Midway with 54.5kg at $21. Better than that recent moderate performance suggests.

form.formComment: Returns from a 46-day let-up. Most recently 7th of 10 at this track on February 28 over 1800m, 6 len behind Tunguska carrying 60kg at $3.50. form.formComment: Most recently 5th of 9 at this track on March 30 over 1800m, 3 len behind Blizzardboy carrying 60kg at $67. The start before that second last in a small field at Durbanville on March 4 over 1600m, 7 len behind Fort Yukon with 60kg at $5. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 5th of 13 at this track on February 22 over 1200m, 4 len behind Fast Train carrying 60kg at $67. Second-up 3rd in a small field at Durbanville on March 21 over 1600m, 1.1 len behind Trip To Camelot carrying 57.5kg at $4. Fitter now and making headway. Will take beating.
